description: This pipeline appears to be designed for analyzing and processing image data, specifically focusing on extracting properties from regions of interest and storing them as annotations. It also involves removing columns from tables, merging annotations, and converting data into annotation tables. The overall function of the pipeline seems to be aimed at identifying and characterizing specific features within images, such as macrophages and bacteria, and organizing the resulting data into a structured format for further analysis.

d9723300-3df4-4948-b54d-251512b97d34.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
d9723300-3df4-4948-b54d-251512b97d34.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

cf616205-fe5e-4b9a-b355-f713677dd15f.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

9267ac34-b6af-448f-bbb6-41db5d9c181a.name: annotation-merge
9267ac34-b6af-448f-bbb6-41db5d9c181a.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

6dc397e7-5d3f-4e20-906b-bfaa63dd377e.name: modify-tables
6dc397e7-5d3f-4e20-906b-bfaa63dd377e.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.

6d0a15d7-1492-4a75-8508-efe51192524b.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
6d0a15d7-1492-4a75-8508-efe51192524b.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

658673e0-e6f3-405b-bce1-fe0883868f41.name: data-to-annotation-table
658673e0-e6f3-405b-bce1-fe0883868f41.description:
Converts data into an annotation table that contains all annotations of the data row. You can also add a string representation of the data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.
